description: Apply the Eli Lilly demerit filter to every molecule with a max-demerits threshold, writing a passes_lilly boolean column (default max demerits 160).
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a results CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .csv/.tsv (smiles column), .sdf, or .txt (one SMILES per line)
LILLY_MAX is the integer max-demerits threshold (medchem default 160)
usage: Set INPUT (molecule file) and LILLY_MAX (integer threshold). Output: lilly.csv.
limitation: Requires the medchem + datamol + rdkit + pandas stack (Python >=3.9) AND the optional native lilly-medchem-rules binaries (mamba install -c conda-forge lilly-medchem-rules); without the binaries the column is filled with nulls, and without the stack the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline.
